biz_name: Esspa Kozmetika Organic Day Spa and Skincare Salon

analytics.last_inbound_snippet: Dear Team Zoca,  Please consider this as our official notice of our cancellation of all Zoca services, effective immediately.  Thank you for your time and consideration.   Best, Scott Kerschbaumer  ESSPA inc 17 brilliant ave  Pittsburgh, Pa

turning_point.snippet: I know we have reviewed this before but please be sure that every representative is sharing our 48 hour cancelation policy with every person who schedules a service. It is important that they also contact us directly at 412-782-3888 if they

signals.snippet: I know we have reviewed this before but please be sure that every representative is sharing our 48 hour cancelation policy with every person who schedules a service. It is important that they also contact us directly at 412-782-3888 if they

cause_analysis.narrative: Esspa Kozmetika Organic Day Spa and Skincare Salon churned on 2026-03-30 after 248 days with Zoca. They sent an explicit cancellation request on 2025-12-19 via app_chat — 101 days before churn. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 101 day(s) before churn via app_chat. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
